title: Cost of Capital: A firm is expected to grow at a rate of...
summary: Calculate the weighted average cost of capital using equity and debt costs with capital structure weights.
prompt: A firm is expected to grow at a rate of 6% indefinitely. If its current free cash flow is $150,000, what will be the terminal value in 5 years if the WACC is 9%?
solution: Terminal Value = FCFF × (1 + g) / (WACC - g) = $150,000 × (1 + 0.06) / (0.09 - 0.06) = $150,000 × 1.06 / 0.03 = $1,060,000 / 0.03 = $1,860,000. This calculation is essential for assessing the long-term value of a firm based on its projected cash flows.
